query: I have two accounts configured: 'personal' (default) and 'work'. List my work inbox and then download attachments from work message 5 to ~/Downloads.
expected_behavior: use `himalaya envelope list -a work` — note `-a` goes AFTER the subcommand
optionally mention `himalaya account list` to confirm account names
do NOT switch the `default` account or modify config to make this work
notes: Guards the `-a` flag ordering AND the multi-account pattern (without unnecessarily editing the default account). The skill must NOT propose editing `config.toml` for a one-off use of the non-default account.
